notes: Single Match prices come from the official matches-all payload (productType=5).
Venue Series prices come from the official lounges endpoint with productTypeCode=VS.
US matches are already in USD. Canada and Mexico amounts are converted to USD using the stored FX snapshot.
Follow My Team and Multi-Match Series do not expose one fixed public starting price in the observed flow; they begin from team or match selection.
Venue Series is only exposed for the official venue codes listed in venueSeriesCodes.

followMyTeam.note: The public flow does not expose one fixed package price before the buyer picks the team path and resulting matches.

multiMatchSeries.note: The public flow is configurable and does not expose a single fixed starting package price on the observed entry step.

privateSuites.note: Private Suites remain inquiry-led or venue-specific and were not exposed as one global public starting price in the observed flow.
